title: Principal Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited!
